name: dotlight-marketplace
description: Marketplace for DotLightSkillset — a lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers

plugins.name: dotlight-skillset
plugins.description: A lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers — Aspire (4 skills incl. aspire-mcp-first), OpenTelemetry, ILSpy, Blazor Playwright, 3 specialized .NET agents, rider-mcp-first (50-90% token savings on .NET work), plus new in 0.5.0: grill-with-docs (Socratic stress-test + glossary/ADR updates), improve-architecture (Ousterhout deep-modules audit), caveman (explicit-trigger ultra-compressed mode).
